title: Oil market at 'tank bottoms' in Asia, and Europe isn't far behind, warns market veteran Jeff Currie
summary_full: Oil markets are nearing minimum operating levels in Asia, with Europe likely next and the U.S. potentially facing shortages by July, said Carlyle's Jeff Currie.
summary_public: Oil markets are nearing minimum operating levels in Asia, with Europe likely next and the U.S. potentially facing shortages by July, said Carlyle's Jeff Currie.
